title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Poojara Telecom Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Visual Merchandiser at Poojara Telecom Asia Pacific Associates
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Poojara Telecom Asia Pacific Associates! We are hiring a Visual Merchandiser for our Chandigarh team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Poojara Telecom Asia Pacific Associates:
Poojara Telecom Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Poojara Telecom Asia Pacific Associates!
